meaning: n.兰斯洛特(亚瑟王圆桌武士中的第一位勇士)
examples: Lancelot: Do you know how to win a sword fight?
Lancelot: If you knew me better, you would not say such things.
If Lancelot had lived next door to Guinevere, he would have done the same.
Famous practitioners, such as Tristan and Iseult or Lancelot and Guinevere, were portrayed playing chess.
